title: Iran War Live Updates: Iran Vows Retaliation for U.S. Attack on Cargo Ship
summary_full: President Trump said that a U.S. Navy destroyer had fired on an Iran-flagged vessel that was trying to evade a blockade. He also said an American delegation was heading to Pakistan for more peace talks, but an Iranian official said there were “no plans” for negotiations.
